title: Large Ore Veins: Create Compat
description: Adds large zinc veins to the Large Ore Veins: Deluxe datapack
body:
Adds larger zinc veins from the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod alongside the vanilla ores.

Notice:

This is a world generation data pack. World generation data packs work best when added to your world during the world creation phase. You can still add them to your world after generating it, you just need to generate new chunks to see the effects.

For more information on how this works or how to modify this, please visit [Larger Ore Veins: Deluxe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/larger-ore-veins-deluxe) by [CodingLegend0100](https://modrinth.com/user/CodingLegend0100)
